title: viola pinetorum var. pinetorum
intro: Viola pinetorum var. pinetorum, also known as alpine pansy or mountain violet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the viola genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Viola pinetorum var. pinetorum include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
